title: Xtra Spicy Australian Beef Casserole
description: A spicy and aerated Australian dish featuring grana-padano, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner, this slow-cook casserole is kid-friendly and packed with flavor. It combines the richness of beef with the tang of cheese and the heat of spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion, bell pepper, and jalapeno to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the tomato sauce, beef broth, and spicy beef seasoning, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook while preparing the cheese mixture.
In a large bowl, whisk together the shredded grana-padano cheese and eggs until well combined.
Add the cooked beef mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until the cheese is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
